name: opencode-federal-platform-pack
description: OpenCode-first AI engineering pack: repository review + platform/architecture/DevSecOps recommendations, and solution architect + product manager discovery

solution-architect.description: Discovery, requirements, constraints, high-level design; asks clarifying questions

product-manager-discovery.description: Turns vague ideas into scoped deliverables with acceptance criteria and estimates

repo-auditor.description: Reviews repos for architecture, maintainability, security, and deployment readiness

federal-security-reviewer.description: Federal-grade review: NIST 800-53, FedRAMP, FISMA, DoD-style controls

gitops-reviewer.description: Evaluates GitOps, CI/CD, IaC, observability, and platform engineering maturity

cloud-platform-reviewer.description: Evaluates cloud repos for AWS, Azure, GCP Well-Architected best practices

repo-assess.description: Full repository assessment: architecture, security, deployment readiness
repo-assess.template: Perform a comprehensive repository assessment. Assess architecture, maintainability, security, and deployment readiness. Produce evidence-based findings with severity levels (High/Medium/Low). Cite specific files and configs. Use schemas/review-report.json structure.

solution-discovery.description: Solution architect discovery: requirements, budget, constraints, compliance
solution-discovery.template: Conduct solution architect discovery. Use contexts/solution-discovery-question-bank.md. Ask clarifying questions about requirements, budget, timeline, users, compliance, and integrations. Produce discovery summary with open questions and recommended next steps. Context: $ARGUMENTS

platform-design.description: Platform architecture design with tradeoffs and cloud alignment
platform-design.template: Design platform architecture for the given context. Consider scalability, reliability, security, cost, and operational excellence. Present options with tradeoffs. Align with cloud Well-Architected where applicable. Context: $ARGUMENTS

federal-checklist.description: Federal compliance checklist (NIST, FedRAMP, FISMA, DoD)
federal-checklist.template: Produce a federal compliance checklist. Use skills/federal-platform-review. Map observable artifacts to NIST 800-53 control families. Identify gaps with evidence. Prioritize remediation. Output: control mapping table, findings, remediation roadmap. Use schemas/compliance-report.json structure.

gitops-audit.description: GitOps, CI/CD, and platform engineering maturity audit
gitops-audit.template: Audit GitOps, CI/CD, IaC, observability, and platform engineering maturity. Use skills/gitops-maturity. Evaluate pipelines, deployment manifests, supply chain controls. Produce maturity scorecard and prioritized improvement roadmap.

quality-gate.description: Pre-push quality gate: evidence, security, docs, supply chain
quality-gate.template: Run pre-push quality gate. Use docs/quality-gate-workflow.md and schemas/quality-gate.schema.json. Check: evidence-based recommendations, no security shortcuts, docs updated with code changes, supply-chain controls for build/deploy. Report pass / pass with warnings / fail with blocking findings.
